data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ - Created tests/hooks/test-v2-hooks-cleanup.sh with 13 test functions covering: compute-diff-hash.sh, capture-review-diff.sh, review-complexity-classifier.sh, skip-review-check.sh, cascade-circuit-breaker.sh, review-stop-check.sh, title-length-validator.sh, orphaned-tasks.sh, restore-ticket-bodies.sh, claude-safe, retro-gather.sh, sprint-next-batch.sh, qualify-ticket-refs.sh
